rationale: zlib is a flat C library: all compression sources live in the root directory with self-contained headers, ideal for gazelle_cc to generate fine-grained cc_library/cc_binary targets.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "zlib",
    version = "1.3.2.1",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")

bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle_cc", version = "0.6.0", dev_dependency = True)
root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")
load("@gazelle_cc//:def.bzl", "gazelle_cc_binary")

# gazelle:exclude contrib
# gazelle:exclude examples
# gazelle:exclude test
# gazelle:exclude win32
# gazelle:exclude msdos
# gazelle:exclude amiga
# gazelle:exclude os400
# gazelle:exclude qnx
# gazelle:exclude watcom
# gazelle:exclude doc

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@gazelle_cc//:gazelle_cc",
)
